div.p: A writer computation produces a result a paired with a log w. w must be a monoid (has an empty value and an append operation) so that logs from successive steps can be combined.
bind (>>=) runs each step, collecting the result value and accumulating all log entries with mappend (<>).

g.title: Append w to the log. Produces no meaningful result value.
Construct a Writer from a value and an initial log entry.
Append w to the log. Produces no meaningful result value.
Construct a Writer from a value and an initial log entry.
